ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the stock exchange */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock exchange was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, index, option) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data point */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the market data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data frequency */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard where the widget is used */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, table, gauge) */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration of the widget */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, volume below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the condition */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditing" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the data frequency (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data frequency */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval of the data frequency (e.g., 1m, 1d, 1w) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., stock prices, trading volumes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_exchanges" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "exchange_id")
)
